title: Create Academy
description: 🎓 Launch Create Academy from your own launcher!
body:
THIS WAY TO LAUNCH CREATE ACADEMY IS STILL IN BETA!

## Minecraft SMP powered up with Create!
_Work together to make industrial automation, fantastical contraptions, and even trains!_

You dont want any to download our custom launcher? Dont worry, you can play Create Academy now only by downloading this modpack!

⚠️ Having issues with or don't want to download our custom launcher? You can simply use this modpack instead!

⚠️First launch may take much longer than usual. This is normal, please be patient!


**More infos on our website [https://createacademy.net/](https://createacademy.net/)**

**Join our [Discord](https://createacademy.net/discord)**

``
Powered with NextGuard by Nyxef
